qa_pairs.question: How can I request the installation or updating of a program or library?
qa_pairs.answer: You can request the installation or updating of a particular program or library by contacting technical support.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I want to use the software environment on my own system?
qa_pairs.answer: If you wish to use our software environment on your own system, please see [[Accessing CVMFS]].

qa_pairs.question: Why might some listed software not be available to me?
qa_pairs.answer: Some software listed may not be available in the specific StdEnv you have loaded.

qa_pairs.question: What is the status of StdEnv/2020 on newer systems?
qa_pairs.answer: StdEnv/2020 is now deprecated/hidden on the newer systems.

qa_pairs.question: How do users access most software, excluding basic system programs?
qa_pairs.answer: Except for basic system programs, you access most software by loading a module.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more information about using the Lmod module system?
qa_pairs.answer: See [[Using modules]] for more on how to use the Lmod module system.

qa_pairs.question: Are Python modules generally installed as Lmod modules?
qa_pairs.answer: Most Python modules are not installed as (Lmod) modules.

qa_pairs.question: How are Python modules provided and where are they stored on the systems?
qa_pairs.answer: Python modules are provided as binary wheels, stored on our systems under `/cvmfs/soft.computecanada.ca/custom/python/wheelhouse/`.

qa_pairs.question: Can you give an example of a Python package provided as a binary wheel?
qa_pairs.answer: One such package is TensorFlow.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find instructions on how to install or list Python packages?
qa_pairs.answer: For instructions on how to install or list Python packages, see the [[Python]] page.

qa_pairs.question: Are R or Perl packages typically installed as modules?
qa_pairs.answer: Most R or Perl packages are not installed.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended method for installing R or Perl packages?
qa_pairs.answer: We recommend installing R or Perl packages in your personal or group file space.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find instructions on how to install R and Perl packages?
qa_pairs.answer: See the [[R]] and [[Perl]] pages for instructions on how to do so.

qa_pairs.question: Is Docker available on the clusters, and if not, what is the alternative?
qa_pairs.answer: Docker is not available on our clusters but Apptainer is available by loading the module `apptainer`.

qa_pairs.question: Can Docker containers be converted for use with Apptainer?
qa_pairs.answer: Docker containers can be converted to Apptainer as discussed [https://apptainer.org/docs/ here].

qa_pairs.question: Why might some software packages not be immediately usable?
qa_pairs.answer: Some of the software packages listed below are not immediately usable because they require you to have a license.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if I try to load a licensed module without being granted access?
qa_pairs.answer: Attempting to load the module for one of these will give you instructions on what to do to obtain access.

qa_pairs.question: Are all software packages accessible on all servers?
qa_pairs.answer: While the vast majority of the software packages are accessible on all our servers, a few are only available at one site or another due to licensing restrictions.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information about site-specific software?
qa_pairs.answer: See [[Available software#Site-specific_software| Site-specific software]] below.

qa_pairs.question: Where are the listed software packages available?
qa_pairs.answer: The packages listed are available in one or more standard software environments.

qa_pairs.question: When might it be necessary to load a different standard environment (StdEnv)?
qa_pairs.answer: In rare circumstances it may be necessary to load a different standard environment (StdEnv) to access a particular version of a particular package.

qa_pairs.question: Are operating system-related packages like Autotools, Make, and Git installed as modules?
qa_pairs.answer: Many packages related to the operating system, such as Autotools, Make, Git, and others, are not installed as modules but are part of the default environment.

qa_pairs.question: What does the 'List of globally-installed modules' table show?
qa_pairs.answer: The table lists software for which an environment module has been installed on our systems.

qa_pairs.question: How do I configure my environment to use a module in simple cases?
qa_pairs.answer: In simple cases, the module name listed in the Module column can be used with the `module load` command to configure your environment.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find prerequisites and brief notes about a software module?
qa_pairs.answer: Click on the corresponding [Expand] link in the Description column for a list of prerequisites and brief notes about the software.

qa_pairs.question: How can I access more extensive documentation for a package?
qa_pairs.answer: If more extensive documentation about a package is available, there will be a link in the Documentation column.

qa_pairs.question: How can I sort the list of modules?
qa_pairs.answer: Click the double arrows in the column heading to sort in ascending or descending order for a given column.

qa_pairs.question: What categories of software are shown in the Type column?
qa_pairs.answer: The Type column shows the software tagged as: ai (artificial intelligence), bio (biology, bioinformatics), chem (chemistry), geo (earth sciences), io (input/output), math (mathematics), mpi (MPI), phys (physics and engineering), tools (languages and libraries), vis (visualization).

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find software for legacy architectures like AVX and SSE3?
qa_pairs.answer: Software for legacy architectures can be found on their respective pages: [[Modules_avx|AVX]] and [[Modules_sse3|SSE3]].

qa_pairs.question: What systems are associated with AVX512?
qa_pairs.answer: AVX512 is associated with Fir, Nibi, Rorqual, Trillium, Killarney, tamIA, and Vulcan systems.

qa_pairs.question: Which system uses AVX2?
qa_pairs.answer: Narval uses AVX2.

qa_pairs.question: Where is most application software installed?
qa_pairs.answer: Most application software is installed in CVMFS, a distributed file system.

qa_pairs.question: Why are some packages not installed in CVMFS?
qa_pairs.answer: Certain packages are not installed in CVMFS, but only at some sites or separately at each site, usually due to license restrictions.
